On this page

RedGPU API v4.1.0-Alpha

RedGPU API / RedGPU / PostEffect / GaussianBlur

Class: GaussianBlur ​

Defined in: src/postEffect/effects/blur/GaussianBlur.ts:26

High-quality Gaussian Blur post-processing effect.

By processing X and Y axis blurs in two separate passes (Separable Blur), it provides extremely smooth and seamless bleeding effects while maintaining computational efficiency.

Combines hardware linear sampling with Gaussian weights to achieve noise-free cinematic quality.

  • Example ​

typescript
const effect = new RedGPU.PostEffect.GaussianBlur(redGPUContext);
effect.size = 64; // 블러 강도 조절
view.postEffectManager.addEffect(effect);

Extends ​

  • AMultiPassPostEffect

Defined in: src/postEffect/core/ASinglePassPostEffect.ts:238

Initializes the effect. Creates compute shaders and uniform buffers.

ParameterTypeDescription
redGPUContextRedGPUContextRedGPU Context
namestringEffect name

computeCodes.msaastring-
computeCodes.nonMsaastring-

render() ​

render(view, width, height, sourceTextureInfo): IPostEffectResult

Defined in: src/postEffect/core/AMultiPassPostEffect.ts:97

Renders all passes sequentially. The result of each pass is passed as input to the next.

Parameters ​

ParameterTypeDescription
viewView3DView3D instance
widthnumberRendering width
heightnumberRendering height
sourceTextureInfoIPostEffectResultInitial input source texture information

Returns ​

IPostEffectResult

Rendering result of the final pass

Inherited from ​

AMultiPassPostEffect.render
